paragraphs: Full-stack engineer with 8 years shipping production software across fintech, retail, and SaaS. Strongest in backend systems and APIs — but comfortable owning the full path from database schema to user-facing component.
I care about correctness first, performance second, and elegance third — in that order. Most performance problems are correctness problems in disguise.
about.callout: Build it right, then build it fast.

metrics.label: API latency reduction on a high-traffic payment service
Open source libraries with 1k+ GitHub stars
Production incidents in the last 12 months

projects.name: Payment Gateway Abstraction
projects.description: Unified multi-PSP payment layer handling routing, retries, and reconciliation across 12 payment providers.
projects.outcome: 40% reduction in API latency, 99.97% uptime over 18 months

projects.name: Real-Time Inventory Sync
projects.description: Event-driven system synchronising warehouse stock across 8 regional depots with sub-second consistency.
projects.outcome: Eliminated manual reconciliation; 3 hours → near real-time

projects.name: Developer Portal
projects.description: Self-service API documentation and sandbox environment for external integrators.
projects.outcome: Reduced integration onboarding time from 2 weeks to 3 days

projects.name: ML Feature Pipeline
projects.description: Batch + streaming feature computation pipeline feeding a fraud detection model in production.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Delivers full-stack features across client engagements from fintech to retail, owning backend services and frontend components end-to-end.
Sets and maintains engineering standards across active projects — test coverage, API contracts, and deployment pipelines.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built and maintained core payment processing services handling millions of transactions per month.
Led migration of a PHP monolith to Go microservices with zero-downtime cutover.
Introduced ClickHouse for analytics, reducing reporting query times from minutes to seconds.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built real-time inventory and order routing services for a fast-scaling grocery delivery platform.
Owned the warehouse management API surface, serving both mobile apps and internal tooling.

experience.title: Junior Developer
bullets: Developed FX and international payment workflows in Python and Django.
Built internal tooling for compliance and KYC onboarding processes.
